name: justicepourtous
description: JusticePourtous — Vos droits en 5 clics. Gratuit. Anonyme.

scripts.test:i18n: node --test test/i18n-audit.test.mjs test/i18n-quality.test.mjs test/i18n-translation.test.mjs test/server-i18n.test.mjs test/i18n-runtime-safeguards.test.mjs
scripts.audit:all: npm run audit:fiches && npm run audit:source-id && npm run audit:legal-review
